description: A FOIA request seeks the following records: that agencies must show how process would be harmed where some factual material was released and similar factual material was withheld.

_provenance.case_name: Army Times Publ'g Co. v. Dep't of the Air Force
_provenance.record_description_quote: that agencies must show how process would be harmed where some factual material was released and similar factual material was withheld
_provenance.outcome_quote: holding that agencies must show how process would be harmed where some factual material
